roles.content: Epistemology foundations: A comprehensive examination of epistemology foundations within Logic & Epistemology, exploring foundational concepts, key arguments, and contemporary interpretations.
Critical perspectives on epistemology foundations: Examining objections, alternative frameworks, and limitations of dominant approaches to epistemology foundations.
Recent developments in epistemology foundations: Current research trends, emerging debates, and new applications of epistemology foundations in contemporary philosophy.
roles.source: British Journal for the Philosophy of Science
